title: NEO 4.0 PROJECT_SPEC
_home: ./program/PROJECT_SPEC.json  (JSON authoritative per Q1; optional ./program/PROJECT_SPEC.md is human commentary only)
_status: INSTALLED 4.0-P3-A (from the KEPT 4.0 Session-0 draft). Live spine schema. Spec-FIRST artifact (D9 / v4 5.7): authored and gated before any constraint/architecture/impl.

intent.description: What the whole app is for, in plain language.

out_of_scope.description: Explicit non-goals; guards scope creep at dispatch time.

verifiable_by.description: How this criterion is checked (test id / harness ref). Ties spec to the independent harness (D9).

open_questions.description: Unresolved spec ambiguity; a non-empty high-impact entry is a rollover/stop trigger (D5/D7).
